components.name: FFmpeg
components.purpose: Controlled fixture generation, subtitle decoding, video sampling, and keyframe extraction
components.redistribution_constraints: GPL source and notice obligations apply to redistribution of this configured binary.
components.commercial_use_constraints: No project-specific prohibition identified; GPL compliance remains required. This is not legal advice.
components.data_use_constraints: None imposed by the executable; source-media rights are governed separately.
components.runtime_requirements: Native Linux executable and compatible shared libraries
components.approval_record: Approved for local M0-M2A deterministic tooling only
known_risks: Requires resource controls for untrusted media

components.name: ffprobe
components.purpose: Read-only media, stream, time-base, language, disposition, and chapter inventory
components.license_source: Locally installed FFmpeg package license output
components.redistribution_constraints: GPL source and notice obligations apply to binary redistribution.
components.commercial_use_constraints: No project-specific prohibition identified; GPL compliance remains required. This is not legal advice.
components.data_use_constraints: None imposed by the executable; source-media rights are governed separately.
components.runtime_requirements: Native Linux executable and compatible shared libraries
components.approval_record: Approved for local M0-M2A deterministic tooling only

components.name: jsonschema
components.commercial_use_constraints: None stated by the MIT license.
components.runtime_requirements: Python >=3.10 upstream; AV-Atlas core requires Python >=3.11
components.approval_record: Core schema dependency pinned by uv.lock
known_risks: Transitive dependencies must remain lock-pinned and audited

components.name: DejaVu Sans
components.redistribution_constraints: Retain copyright/trademark/license notice; modified fonts must follow naming restrictions.
components.commercial_use_constraints: May be sold only as part of a larger software package, per the installed license text.
components.runtime_requirements: Font file available at the documented Linux path
known_risks: Different font builds can change fixture bytes

components.name: Tesseract OCR
components.purpose: Approved local CPU-only frame-level text detection and recognition
components.source: Locally installed Ubuntu distribution package at /usr/bin/tesseract
components.redistribution_constraints: Apache-2.0 notice obligations and Ubuntu package notices apply.
components.commercial_use_constraints: No project-specific prohibition identified; not legal advice.
components.runtime_requirements: Native Linux amd64 executable; Leptonica 1.82.0; CPU-only; OMP_THREAD_LIMIT=1 per process; maximum four workers
components.approval_record: Operator authorized the locally packaged Tesseract executable and locally installed English data for M2B only

components.name: libtesseract
components.redistribution_constraints: Apache-2.0 notice obligations and Ubuntu package notices apply.
components.commercial_use_constraints: No project-specific prohibition identified; not legal advice.
components.data_use_constraints: None beyond source-media rights governed separately.
components.approval_record: Transitive native runtime of the operator-approved packaged executable

components.name: Tesseract English language data
components.source: Locally installed Ubuntu distribution package at /usr/share/tesseract-ocr/5/tessdata/eng.traineddata
components.redistribution_constraints: Apache-2.0 notice obligations and Ubuntu package notices apply.
components.commercial_use_constraints: No project-specific prohibition identified; not legal advice.
components.data_use_constraints: Language data is third-party pretrained data, not AV-Atlas-trained weights.
components.runtime_requirements: 4,113,088-byte traineddata file and compatible approved Tesseract installation
components.approval_record: Operator authorized locally installed English language data for M2B
known_risks: Synthetic accuracy does not generalize to real media

components.name: Tesseract orientation and script detection data
components.purpose: Installed orientation/script data; inventoried but not used by the frozen M2B default configuration
components.source: Locally installed Ubuntu distribution package at /usr/share/tesseract-ocr/5/tessdata/osd.traineddata
components.redistribution_constraints: Apache-2.0 notice obligations and Ubuntu package notices apply.
components.commercial_use_constraints: No project-specific prohibition identified; not legal advice.
components.data_use_constraints: Third-party pretrained data; not AV-Atlas-trained weights.
components.runtime_requirements: 10,562,727-byte traineddata file; unused unless explicitly configured
components.approval_record: Inventory only; the operator authorized English data, and frozen M2B does not select osd
known_risks: Installed but outside the approved frozen eng-only runtime path
